description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish, featuring two drawers on the left side with metallic handles and four short, light-colored legs. The desk has a spacious flat top surface, partially covered by a large white sheet of paper placed diagonally. The front of the desk is open beneath the tabletop, providing legroom for a seated user, while the back is fully enclosed. The drawers are flush with the front face, and the handles are simple and rectangular, matching the utilitarian design. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a practical layout suitable for work or study. The desk's finish is smooth and even, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A sturdy, dark brown wooden desk with two left-side drawers, metallic handles, and a large white paper on its smooth top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with handles on the left, open leg space, and a white paper on the desk's surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid side panel and the white paper extending over the edge of the desk.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a fully enclosed back panel and the white paper on the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain side panel and the white paper visible on the desk's surface.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the two drawers and open leg space, while the back is fully enclosed; the left and right sides are plain panels.
